## Question we need answered
<!-- One sharp question. The spike is done when this is answered. -->

## Why do we need to know this now?
<!-- What decision does this unblock? -->

## Timebox

- [ ] 2 hours
- [ ] half day
- [ ] 1 day

## Output
<!-- Cursor: produce this as `/docs/spikes/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md` -->
- Summary of findings
- Recommendation (with reasoning)
- Risks or unknowns that remain
